ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match was played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "tournament" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player (e.g., right, left) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., fast, spin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the performance belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who performed */,
  "dismissed" TEXT /* Method of dismissal (e.g., not out, bowled, caught) */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "balls" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "opponent_short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the opponent team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "venue_city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "venue_country" TEXT /* Country where the venue is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the analytic belongs to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., batting average, strike rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., batting, bowling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., batting, bowling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_team" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the association */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_team_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_team_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_opponent" (
  "match_opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-opponent association */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "opponent_team" INTEGER /* Opponent team ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_opponent_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_opponent_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id")
)
